## [1.7.5](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/compare/v1.7.4...v1.7.5) (2026-03-18)

### Bug Fixes

* **a11y:** add webkit backdrop-filter prefix and focus fallback for older browsers ([568b3d1](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/568b3d136d4a22013a78586469f2f2913c958703))
* **a11y:** disable all animations and transitions for prefers-reduced-motion ([290fd3b](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/290fd3b282aaf297e6b1b458e172c0e60a9d30c6))
* clear search input and query state on dialog close ([e6d82b4](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/e6d82b4e7e0ccbe7a995d1808687e824ebf0fe9d))
* debounce resize handlers, harden search, extract named constants in docs.js ([ec6a0df](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/ec6a0df310625c8f7d49a1a148b57b5b0b43bfcb))
* guard sessionStorage write and document heading level shift in chatbot.js ([08cff58](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/08cff58fffe6745e06fec3f7ce43bc3ba3eb7cf2))
* hide chatbot shell in print stylesheet ([1073bb2](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/1073bb2f21daefa205542600212ca483df99addd))
* raise specificity of code-block padding-right to prevent copy button overlap ([a933c76](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/a933c7695e9fb3036a2ebf4942a5708e8ccef765))
* resolve undefined --pine variable and base pre overflow clipping ([9a6f300](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/9a6f3004e60a5fc1fa56d56b2754d62a4cda7ed8))
* restore font-weight 700 on chatbot close button after consolidation ([1733f8e](https://github.com/jflamb/fdic-mcp-server/commit/1733f8e7ee9780e2e43e1bfb7cc457612531492c))
summary: bug fixes in the latest published release, including a11y: add webkit backdropfilter prefix and focus fallback for older browsers.
